page_metadata.biotools__summary: Standard and network-based gene enrichment analysis in human and model organisms | NETGE-PLUS is a web-server for standard and network-based functional interpretation of gene sets of human and model organisms | NETGE-PLUS is optimized to be used on a Google Chrome browser | NETGE-PLUS is a web-server for standard and network-based functional interpretation of gene sets of human and model organisms, including S. scrofa, S. cerevisiae, E. coli and A. thaliana
